content.speakerText: You mentioned you led a team project—what was your biggest challenge?
content.speakerTextCn: 你提到带过团队项目，最大的挑战是什么？

options.text: I was just lucky to have a great team.
Getting everyone on the same page was tough, but I set weekly check-ins and it really helped.
The project was easy because we had a lot of time.
I didn't have any challenges—it all went smoothly.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用STAR原则，明确挑战并说明解决方案，符合面试回答规范。其他选项要么回避问题（opt_1, opt_4），要么否认挑战的存在（opt_3），不符合面试官期望的反思与成长型回答。

content.speakerText: How did that experience make you better at your job?
content.speakerTextCn: 这段经历让你在工作中变得更好了吗？

options.text: I got promoted after that project.
I became way more organized—I now plan everything two weeks ahead.
It was just part of my job description.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调行为改变（更有序地规划），符合‘成长与行为改变’的评分标准。其他选项聚焦结果（晋升、老板喜欢）或被动态度，未能体现个人能力提升，不符合面试官考察重点。

content.speakerText: Can you tell me about a time you had to resolve a conflict within your team?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能讲讲你如何解决团队内部冲突的经历吗？

options.text: I avoided talking to them until they sorted it out themselves.
I facilitated a one-on-one conversation and we agreed on clearer roles.
Conflict? We never had any issues.
I reported it to HR and let them handle it.

content.explanation: 正确答案展示主动解决、沟通与协作能力，符合经验聚焦型面试的评估标准。opt_1 是回避责任，opt_3 否认问题，opt_4 过度依赖上级，均缺乏个人能动性，不符合高分回答特征��

content.template: The biggest challenge was ______—I learned to prioritize better.
content.hint: 这是常见的工作挑战之一，与效率和计划相关
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（时间管理）

content.template: I stopped guessing and started using ______ to make decisions.
content.hint: 强调从主观判断转向客观依据，是职场成长的关键
content.knowledgePoint: 核心句型（用数据做决策）

content.template: To fix communication issues, we switched to ______.
content.hint: 这是现代团队常用的协作工具，常用于解决沟通障碍
content.knowledgePoint: 场景惯用搭配（工具名称用于解决问题）

content.speakerText: You mentioned you led a team project—what was your biggest challenge?
content.speakerTextCn: 你提到带过团队项目，最大的挑战是什么？
expectedAnswers: Getting everyone aligned was hard, so I started daily stand-ups and it improved transparency.
Communication gaps were causing delays—I introduced a shared project board and it made a big difference.
It was balancing deadlines with team well-being—I learned to delegate more effectively.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确指出具体挑战
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用过去时态
表达自然度：是否像母语者自然表达，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含 challenge, solution, result 或类似表达

content.speakerText: How did that experience make you better at your job?
content.speakerTextCn: 这段经历让你在工作中变得更好了吗？
expectedAnswers: I became more proactive—I now flag risks before they become problems.
I stopped waiting for instructions and started taking initiative based on data.
It taught me the value of feedback—I now ask for it regularly from peers.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否强调行为或思维模式的改变，而非结果或奖励
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的动词时态（现在时描述当前习惯）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但专业的表达（如 'flag risks', 'take initiative'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'became', 'started', 'learned', 'now' 等体现成长的词

content.speakerText: Tell me about a time you had to adapt to a sudden change in a project.
content.speakerTextCn: 请讲讲你如何应对项目中突发变化的经历。
expectedAnswers: When our client changed requirements last-minute, I reorganized our sprint backlog and held a quick team sync—we delivered on time anyway.
The original tool failed, so I researched alternatives and trained the team on a new platform within 48 hours.
I had to shift from in-person to remote work overnight—I created a new communication protocol that stuck even after we returned.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰描述变化、行动与结果
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的时态（过去时描述事件，现在时描述持续影响）
表达自然度：是否使用真实职场表达（如 'sprint backlog', 'sync', 'trained the team'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'adapt', 'change', 'action', 'result' 等关键词
